cases.name: join_membership_reject
cases.reason: Mixed-cluster join must fail closed on cluster UUID mismatch, unsupported role advertisement, or wire-version mismatch.

cases.name: publication_mismatch
cases.reason: Followers must reject publication diffs whose base UUID does not match the cached state.

cases.name: allocation_invalid_store_contract
cases.reason: Mixed-cluster allocation must reject shard routings whose recovery source or store contract is not admitted.

cases.name: recovery_relocation_interrupted
cases.reason: Peer recovery must fail closed when relocation is interrupted.

cases.name: routing_hole
cases.reason: Mixed-cluster routing must fail closed when no started shard copy can be found.

cases.name: stale_replica
cases.reason: Replica replication must reject stale sequence numbers before partial application.
